item.title: Don’t mess with the Zohran.
item.description: “New York City is now the first place in the U.S. to ban all deceptive subscription practices. Mamdani's new rule will heavily fine any subscription service that adds hidden fees and makes it purposely difficult to unsubscribe. This includes streaming services like Netflix.”
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid

item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Adam Zyglis’s work is poignant and sharp.
item.description: http://www.adamzyglis.com/ "I’m thrilled to announce I’ve won the 2025 Sigma Delta Chi Award for Editorial Cartooning! It’s an honor to be recognized again by the Society of Professional Journalists, an organization that promotes and celebrates excellence in journalism around the country. Thank you to the SPJ and The Buffalo News. ?" From the judges: “These are challenging days for editorial cartoonists. It’s easy to get so angry - the results are hot instead of illuminating. Zyglis keeps a sense of humor and irony, without resorting to cheap shots. And that makes him special right now.” ✍️ The Buffalo News Society of Pro. Journalists
item.dc:creator: onerousempire

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 899
item.description:

20
21
22 meant to post this yesterday
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alan Rudbeck Lindhardt
"When I feed the hungry, they call me a saint. When I ask why people are hungry, they call me a communist." - Helder Camara So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: This could be a good trend.
item.description: “The POWER Act was intended to ensure fairness and accountability when large energy users, like data centers, take up more load on Oregon’s electrical grid,” she said in a statement. “We must continue to do whatever we can to keep working families and small businesses from absorbing the costs of data center energy use.” https://www.opb.org/article/2026/07/07/oregon-data-center-general-electric-rate-hikes

item.title: Anyone laughing at this yet?
item.description: The tastiest sauce: https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/west-virginia-university-woke-washington-center-b3012708.html NOBODY who shows up at university is worried about "woke". Absolutely nobody smart enough to get in either gives a shit or is part of the group that is willing to back up people that "woke" speaks up for. I really hope the one kid who signed up is actually a "woke" kid that just forces the program to run and all they do is troll the professor.
item.dc:creator: DamnThursdays

item.title: Trump threatens to bomb Iran for a year straight if they attempt to assassinate him – Paranoid much
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: What Ai vomit has done to the art scene.
item.description: https://www.buzzfeednews.com/article/chrisstokelwalker/art-subreddit-illustrator-ai-art-controversy Back in the day you spent years in the trenches learning to draw, edit, handle a camera and digital tools. Here is a good example. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TiCLMePjK-Y You reaped the well deserved praise and admiration. I did my 17 years so far and you never stop learning. But then shit changed for us. This is what Ai has done. Now we have to defend our work left to right. And I can't really blame the skeptics because they like me don't know what we are looking at are the real work of artist or some piss ant prompt monkey. A handy tool if in doubt. I tested it. It is reliable. It nails the slop https://www.zerogpt.com/ai-image-detector Me back in 2010! Saw all the art of other artists thinking I was never going to learn this. But here is the thing! Just start... Learn, practice, study, read tutorials and you will get there. The learning curve is the joy. No matter if it is digital or traditional art. Don't think 10 years ahead. Keep your mind on the now and before you know it, you are the artist you saw 10 years ago Just don't be a slop user.
item.dc:creator: Rastifan

item.dc:creator: MadJuansReturn

item.title: May the Force be with him. Because judging by the last few years, his droid support package definitely isn't.
item.description:
Somehow, the Senator Returned. Again. And Again. And Again.
In a galaxy not remotely far away, the Senate discovered a horrifying secret: term limits are apparently weaker than the Dark Side. ⚡ At some fucking point, you stop asking whether a politician still represents the future and start wondering if they're being kept alive by Sith alchemy, spare batteries, and pure institutional inertia. The Force may bind the galaxy together, but apparently it also binds certain elected officials to their office chairs indefinitely. "Unlimited power!" was supposed to be a warning, not a fucking retirement plan. May the Force be with us. Because apparently the succession plan isn't. #StarWars #PoliticalHumor #DemotivationalPoster #Satire #MitchMcConnell #UnlimitedPower #GalacticSenate #DarkSideOfPolitics #Imgur #MayTheForceBeWithYou
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Summer Glau – Terminator: The Sarah Connor Chronicles
item.description:
Glau portrays a T-900 infiltration unit by the alias of Cameron Phillips. She has been sent back in time to the high school years of John Connor since the future has diverged
2
3
4. Learning from a gang lookout (Sabrina Perez; S01E02) https://youtu.be/D0nv5-s8sZ0

item.title: More Infographics.
item.description:
https://www.reddit.com/r/coolguides/comments/1r5rwtd/a_cool_guide_about_world_history_from_3150_bc_to/ (Higher res drive version: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1n_AQEBNrCQYYfpmk9cSfU66P58jtoE8r/view?usp=sharing)
https://stonecenter.gc.cuny.edu/files/2022/09/Strolovitch-1.pdf
Landback, Reparations, Join or Start a local Socialist Rifle Association, Worker Soviet, Mutual Aid Network, Tenants' Union, Unemployed Union, Trade Union, or Artists Union Today! https://socialistra.org/ https://mutualaidnetwork.org/ https://www.mutualaidhub.org/ https://olmsapps.dol.gov/olpdr/ https://ua.org/join-the-ua/find-a-local-union/ https://ndncollective.org/landback/ https://naacp.org/resources/reparations My other post ( https://imgur.com/gallery/polymer-handcuff-key-jcRy47i ) today did well, So I figured y'all might want more infographics. Frontpage Edit: Thanks everyone, More to come.
item.dc:creator: TheDefective

item.title: My friends from the East coast beat the heat
